holdings.infoBox: HSMV is an equity ETF with a total of 151 individual holdings. The top holdings are Phillips Edison & Company stock at 2.17%, OGE Energy at 2.06%, Ingredion at 1.66%, Ellington Financial at 1.63%, and NNN REIT at 1.53%.

overview.description: The First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Small/Mid ETF (HSMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an active fund of small- and mid-cap US stocks selected based on volatility forecast. HSMV was launched on Apr 6, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
